interface.style: CSS provides the visual look (colors, margins, fonts).
interface.interactivity: JavaScript provides the brain (actions, buttons, logic).

technical_constraints.nesting: Always close your tags! An open <div> can break the whole layout.
technical_constraints.selectors: In CSS, use '.' for classes and '#' for unique IDs.

tips: Use 'Flexbox' or 'Grid' to align elements easily.
The 'Inspector' tool in the browser (F12) is the most powerful tool for web developers.
